description_long: This object is a cylindrical bottle of lotion with a white body and a green label on the front, prominently displaying the 3M brand and product information. The bottle features a distinctive angled spray dispenser at the top, which is white and extends horizontally from the cap area. The front label includes both English and French text, with the product name 'Cavilon' clearly visible. The bottle is topped with a functional spray mechanism, likely made of plastic, designed for easy application of the lotion. The overall design is clean and professional, with the 3M logo and slogan 'Science. Applied to Life.' visible above the bottle in some views. The bottle appears to be made primarily of plastic, with a likely liquid interior and a small amount of air space.
description: A white cylindrical lotion bottle with a green label and an angled white spray dispenser, featuring the 3M logo and 'Cavilon' product name.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 3M logo, slogan, and the bottle's green label with product details and spray dispenser.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the bottle and the extended spray dispenser, with minimal label visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view with mirrored text, showing the back of the bottle and the spray dispenser from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the spray dispenser, with partial label visible.
